node.statement: RESULT E5b (Laughlin state on sphere): Psi_N^{(m)} = prod_{i<j} (u_i*v_j - u_j*v_i)^m, with S = (1/2)*m*(N-1). Is exact eigenstate of hard-core pseudopotential model. Overlap with Coulomb ground state: N=3: 1.000, N=6: 0.9964, N=8: 0.9954, N=10: 0.9928 (P04-Fano Table I). [P01-Haldane p.606; P04-Fano Table I]
